description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a rectangular footprint and a combination of flat and gable roofs. The main structure features a flat roof, while an attached single-story section and a detached garage or outbuilding have red-tiled gable roofs. The house has multiple white-framed windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, and a wooden front door facing a small green lawn patch. There is a paved driveway or walkway leading to the entrance, and a fenced courtyard area with a wooden privacy fence and some greenery. The rear section includes a covered area connecting the main house to the outbuilding, which could serve as a garage or storage. The overall design is practical and suburban, with a blend of brick, tile, and wood materials.
description: A two-story brick house with a flat main roof, attached gable-roofed outbuilding, and asymmetrical white-framed windows. Features include a small lawn, paved driveway, and a fenced courtyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, small green lawn, and two-story brick facade with white-framed windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long brick wall, attached outbuilding with a red-tiled gable roof, and a section of greenery along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the gable-roofed outbuilding, covered walkway, and fenced courtyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main house, attached outbuilding, wooden fence, and paved driveway leading to the entrance.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with no porch, small green lawn, and paved approach
